At least one Kuwaiti F-18 is believed to be responsible, the report said. According to a US official, the pilot of the F-18 Hornet mistakenly launched three missiles towards the three US jets, which went down over Kuwait. A Kuwaiti F/A-18 fighter jet
The incident was the first loss of an American aircraft since Operation Epic Fury began February 28 with a massive wave of American and Israeli airstrikes on Iran, which has retaliated with missiles and drones against Kuwait and countries across the Gulf after its supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was assassinated in a joint US-Israeli airstrikes on Saturday. Meanwhile, Iran took the claim for shooting down the jets, as the war with the United States-backed Israel rapidly escalated.
